# Copilot Instructions (Ticketing CMS)

This workspace is a personal ticketing/CMS project inspired by ASAP Tickets.

## Goals

- Scaffold a full-stack ticketing CMS (events, ticket inventory, bookings, admin dashboard).
- Use a modern stack (Next.js + Prisma + SQLite) for local development.
- Provide clear setup steps for running the project once Node.js is installed.

## Notes

- The environment currently has no Node.js or Python runtime installed.
- The generated project structure is intended to be used once Node.js is installed on the machine.

## Current status

- [x] Project scaffold files created (Next.js + Prisma + Tailwind)
- [x] Node.js/runtime installed (required to run dev server and CLI tools)
- [x] Dependencies installed (npm install)
- [ ] Database migrated (npm run prisma:migrate)
- [ ] Development server started (npm run dev)
